description_long: This shampoo bottle is a tall, slender container with gently curved sides and a rounded shoulder leading up to a small, cylindrical neck. The bottle is made of a smooth, semi-glossy plastic material and is topped with a black screw cap. The front label features minimalist black text, including the brand name 'actually' and the product type 'Rejuvenating Shampoo', along with volume information. The back of the bottle displays additional product information and a barcode, all printed in a clean, sans-serif font. The overall design is modern and understated, with no decorative graphics or imagery. The bottle is part of a coordinated set of personal care products, all sharing a similar color and design language.
description: A tall, slender shampoo bottle with a rounded shoulder, black screw cap, and minimalist black text on a smooth, pale surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with brand name, product type, and volume in clear black text.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's narrow profile and the cylindrical black cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the product information, barcode, and additional text details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's curved silhouette and the alignment of the cap and base.
attribute_brand_logo: The front label features a stylized '@' symbol as the brand logo.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and slender with gently curved sides and a rounded shoulder tapering to a small neck
